station_logic.collection: Data is collected erratically or via experimental features with no clear boundary.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing is unpredictable; your data may be sent to unforeseen future partners.
station_logic.retention: There is no set lifespan for your data; it exists in a state of perpetual limbo.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Recklessness. The policy ignores basic safety standards, putting your identity at risk.

station_logic.collection: You are the source of power; data is only gathered when you actively provide it.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing is limited to essential tools needed to make the service work.
station_logic.retention: Data is kept only as long as the active 'spell' (the service) is being cast.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Manipulation. The service uses 'dark patterns' to trick you into hidden data actions.

station_logic.collection: Collection happens in the shadows; logs and metadata track you silently.
station_logic.sharing: Data is kept in an internal silo, shared only with mysterious affiliates.
station_logic.retention: Data is moved to cold storage or hidden archives, away from the light of day.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Hidden agendas. There are secrets within the policy intentionally kept from you.

station_logic.collection: Fertile harvesting of rich, sensory data (voice, face, and behavior).
station_logic.sharing: Your data feeds a massive ecosystem of partners and interconnected apps.
station_logic.retention: Data is kept indefinitely to 'nurture' and grow the company's AI models.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Smothering. Data collection is overbearing, leaving no room for personal boundaries.

station_logic.collection: Strict, mandatory collection of legal identity and official documents.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing is strictly controlled and aimed at law enforcement or regulators.
station_logic.retention: Data is bound by strict statutory periods; it remains until the law says so.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Tyranny. The company exerts excessive control, using legal jargon to strip autonomy.

station_logic.collection: Collection follows rigid, traditional industry standards and protocols.
station_logic.sharing: Data is shared only with accredited institutions and standardized auditors.
station_logic.retention: Data is archived for historical interest, following a traditional lifecycle.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Blind Dogma. Following the letter of the law while ignoring actual user safety.

station_logic.collection: Collection is a union; data is synced across multiple social accounts.
station_logic.sharing: A marriage of data; shared with trusted partners for marketing efforts.
station_logic.retention: Data stays as long as the 'relationship' (your account) remains active.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Incompatibility. The 'partners' are not what they seem; a breach of trust is likely.

station_logic.collection: Active and relentless tracking of your physical movements and momentum.
station_logic.sharing: Your data travels across borders to international entities at high speed.
station_logic.retention: Retention is transient; data is captured in motion and overwritten quickly.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Loss of control. Your data is moving too fast through too many hands.

station_logic.collection: Collection is balanced and fair, requiring explicit consent for every action.
station_logic.sharing: Shared only for accountability and to uphold your specific legal rights.
station_logic.retention: Data is kept only as long as is strictly 'necessary' for the original purpose.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Injustice. The policy uses legal loopholes to bypass the spirit of privacy.

station_logic.collection: Data is collected in solitude; it stays on your device and never hits the cloud.
station_logic.sharing: Total isolation; no data leaves the device to be shared with anyone.
station_logic.retention: Ephemeral storage; data is designed to be forgotten almost immediately.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Isolation. Privacy promises are so strict the service becomes unusable.

station_logic.collection: Collection is a game of chance based on the 'Wheel' of your history.
station_logic.sharing: Data is tossed into real-time ad auctions to see where it lands today.
station_logic.retention: Retention is tied to the 'Session'; once the wheel stops, the data vanishes.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Bad luck. Automated systems have categorized you into a disadvantageous group.

station_logic.collection: Collection is focused on identifying 'beastly' behavior and security threats.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with cybersecurity firms to maintain the integrity of the wall.
station_logic.retention: Hardened storage; backups are kept long-term to survive system attacks.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Brute force. Security measures are overly aggressive, treating users as suspects.

station_logic.collection: Collection is restricted or paused while your status is under review.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing is suspended; your data is in a 'wait-and-see' state.
station_logic.retention: Data is frozen in time; retention is extended while a dispute is resolved.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Stagnation. Data is stuck in legal limbo with no clear path to deletion.

station_logic.collection: Collection triggers the end of anonymity; identity is captured for transition.
station_logic.sharing: Data is shared as part of a total transition, such as a company merger.
station_logic.retention: Absolute deletion. Once the cycle ends, the data is irreversibly scrubbed.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Resistance to change. Data refuses to die; traces linger after deletion.

station_logic.collection: Data is diluted upon collection, blended into anonymized pools.
station_logic.sharing: Shared only for 'compatible' purposes where identity is hidden.
station_logic.retention: Data is 'tempered' over time, becoming less specific as it ages.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Imbalance. The 'anonymization' is weak and easily de-masked.

station_logic.collection: Collection is a trap; 'dark patterns' force you to give up too much.
station_logic.sharing: Your data is sold to brokers; you are the product in this transaction.
station_logic.retention: Bound indefinitely. 'Shadow profiles' keep your essence after you leave.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Release. You've seen the trap, but the cost of breaking the terms is high.

station_logic.collection: Collection via emergency bypass; privacy structures are falling.
station_logic.sharing: Forced disclosure; shared during bankruptcy or catastrophic failure.
station_logic.retention: Sudden destruction; data is wiped or lost due to an unforeseen event.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Avoiding disaster. A near-miss; a breach happened, but your data survived.

station_logic.collection: Transparent collection; the process is clear, bright, and easy to see.
station_logic.sharing: Data is shared for public inspiration or through transparency reports.
station_logic.retention: Kept as a 'guiding light' for future community development.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: False hope. Transparency is performative; hidden details remain.

station_logic.collection: Collection of shadows; they collect what they 'think' they know about you.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with 'unnamed' partners in a murky, ill-defined network.
station_logic.retention: Unclear retention schedules; your data fades into a long night.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Deception. Inferences are wrong and used to misguide your experience.

station_logic.collection: Radiant clarity; you know exactly why data is taken.
station_logic.sharing: Shared only to bring you more value and better experiences.
station_logic.retention: Data is kept for 'User Success' and deleted once the joy is fulfilled.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Burnout. 'Joyous' features harvest so much data they drain your battery.

station_logic.collection: Collection for accountability; every action is logged for review.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with regulators to judge whether rules are being followed.
station_logic.retention: Periodic re-evaluation; data is 'called up' to see if it should exist.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Harsh judgment. Unfairly penalized based on your data history.

station_logic.collection: A global net; a holistic picture of your life across all borders.
station_logic.sharing: Universal sharing; data becomes part of global infrastructure.
station_logic.retention: Data is part of a 'Final Archive' kept as part of world history.

major_arcana.reversed_logic: Incompleteness. The global picture is fragmented and lost.

station_logic.collection: New financial beginnings; collection of primary payment methods.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing with banks and processors to plant the seed of trade.
station_logic.retention: Retained as a physical ledger for tax and audit purposes.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Financial loss. Payment data is vulnerable or improperly handled.

station_logic.collection: Balancing data collection across different service tiers.
station_logic.sharing: Trading your data in exchange for 'free' features.
station_logic.retention: Retention fluctuates based on your current subscription status.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Instability. The balance of trade is unfair; you give more than you get.

station_logic.collection: Collection of your professional 'craft' and work history.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with workplace partners to manage your employment.
station_logic.retention: Retained as a permanent record of your professional labor.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Poor craftsmanship. Data is used to sabotage professional reputation.

station_logic.collection: Hoarding physical device IDs to lock your digital identity.
station_logic.sharing: Internal use only; the company guards this data like a treasure.
station_logic.retention: Refusal to let go; device IDs are kept even after you leave.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Greed. Data hoarding prevents you from using your own devices freely.

station_logic.collection: Collection of data regarding your financial struggles.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with debt collectors or 'outside the wall' agencies.
station_logic.retention: Kept until all debts and 'losses' are settled.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Poverty of privacy. Data is used to exploit your financial vulnerability.

station_logic.collection: Voluntary collection for social or charitable programs.
station_logic.sharing: Data is 'gifted' to non-profits or research partners.
station_logic.retention: Data is kept as a legacy of your contribution.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Selfishness. The 'charitable' sharing is actually a hidden data sale.

station_logic.collection: Tracking your assets to see how your value grows.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with market analysts to evaluate your potential.
station_logic.retention: Long-term storage to track the 'yield' of your data over time.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Failed investment. Data is kept long-term but provides no value to you.

station_logic.collection: Meticulous tracking of movements to refine the app.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with UX tools to study your behavior.
station_logic.retention: Data is kept while 'craftsmen' polish the product.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Wasted labor. Extensive tracking that fails to improve the user experience.

station_logic.collection: Profiling your refined tastes and financial independence.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with high-end, exclusive marketing partners.
station_logic.retention: Retained as a V.I.P. profile for a life of digital luxury.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Isolation. Your wealth profile causes you to be excluded or upcharged.

station_logic.collection: Collection that encompasses your entire home and household.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with 'Parent Companies' and across the corporate family.
station_logic.retention: A permanent legacy; data passed through account generations.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Family burden. Household data is used to control or surveil the family.

station_logic.collection: A new, small stream of financial or physical data.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with early-stage testers and startup partners.
station_logic.retention: Temporary storage during the prototype phase.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Lack of focus. Experimental data is leaked due to poor testing.

station_logic.collection: Methodical tracking of location for physical delivery.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with carriers who move goods in the real world.
station_logic.retention: Kept until delivery is confirmed and mission is over.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Stagnation. Logistic data is stuck; delivery of privacy is delayed.

station_logic.collection: Nurturing your body through health and wellness data.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with health practitioners and fitness ecosystems.
station_logic.retention: Long-term storage to track physical well-being history.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Neglect. Health data is mishandled, causing worry or insecurity.

station_logic.collection: Collection of data that defines you as a business asset.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with commercial giants to manage the marketplace.
station_logic.retention: Permanent cornerstone of business infrastructure.

pentacles.reversed_logic: Materialism. Data is treated only as a commodity, ignoring its humanity.

station_logic.collection: Collection requires signing away your right to a day in court.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with legal counsel to defend against future claims.
station_logic.retention: Retained as 'Exhibit A' in case of a legal dispute.

swords.reversed_logic: Legal chaos. Unenforceable or confusingly written arbitration.

station_logic.collection: Data collected under two conflicting sets of rules.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing is stuck in a stalemate between 'yes' and 'no'.
station_logic.retention: Retention is in limbo while the company decides on the law.

swords.reversed_logic: Indecision. Conflicting terms lead to accidental data exposure.

station_logic.collection: Heartbreak: collection methods have been compromised.
station_logic.sharing: Shared during a 'separation' or painful security leak.
station_logic.retention: Retained only as a record of a 'broken' privacy promise.

swords.reversed_logic: Healing. Recovering from a breach; data is being secured.

station_logic.collection: Collection is resting; 'Do Not Track' signals are honored.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing is in a meditative state; nothing is moving.
station_logic.retention: Data is in 'deep sleep' storage, safe from processing.

swords.reversed_logic: Restlessness. Data is supposedly 'at rest' but is being used.

station_logic.collection: Collection is aggressive and forceful, often without realizing.
station_logic.sharing: Shared to 'gain an advantage' or win a battle.
station_logic.retention: Kept as a 'spiteful' record to prevent using other services.

swords.reversed_logic: Defeat. The company has lost the legal battle over your data.

station_logic.collection: Collection happens as you transition from a troubled past.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with a new platform as you move your digital life.
station_logic.retention: Kept only long enough to ensure a safe journey to a new app.

swords.reversed_logic: Baggage. You cannot leave; your data is 'anchored' to the platform.

station_logic.collection: Collection by stealth; done in the background while you sleep.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with 'secret' partners through a backdoor API.
station_logic.retention: Hidden retention; the data exists in places not told about.

swords.reversed_logic: Confession. The company admits to stealth tracking and stops.

station_logic.collection: You are blind to collection; trapped by the interface.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with entities that keep you 'locked' in.
station_logic.retention: Forbidden from deleting; retained against your will.

swords.reversed_logic: Release. You have found the loophole to delete your data.

station_logic.collection: Collection based on fear; tracking every 'threat'.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with threat-intel firms to manage anxiety.
station_logic.retention: Kept because of 'what might happen' if they delete it.

swords.reversed_logic: Reality check. The 'threats' were exaggerated to justify tracking.

station_logic.collection: The final collection. They take everything one last time.
station_logic.sharing: Sharing ends in a final settlement of all accounts.
station_logic.retention: Data is truly dead. Final, irreversible termination.

swords.reversed_logic: Resurrection. Data thought deleted has suddenly reappeared.

station_logic.collection: Collection of 'intellectual' data to monitor for theft.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with copyright agents to protect property.
station_logic.retention: Kept as a record of legal thoughts and creations.

swords.reversed_logic: All talk. Legal threats with no actual policy substance.

station_logic.collection: Swift collection using rapid-fire AI sensors.
station_logic.sharing: Shared in milliseconds with automated engines.
station_logic.retention: Kept for 'quick-strike' analysis before cycling out.

swords.reversed_logic: Impulsiveness. AI makes a fast, wrong decision about your data.

station_logic.collection: Objective and sharp collection, filtered for facts.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with independent auditors who judge with a cold eye.
station_logic.retention: Retained for quality control and objective evaluation.

swords.reversed_logic: Coldness. Objective data used to make a heartless decision.

station_logic.collection: Collection mandated by the highest legal authority.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with governments and courts under legal command.
station_logic.retention: Permanent retention as an official record of the law.

swords.reversed_logic: Abuse of power. Legal authority used to over-collect data.

station_logic.collection: A new spark; collection begins for a creative new feature.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with promoters launching your data into the world.
station_logic.retention: Kept to ignite future marketing possibilities.

wands.reversed_logic: Flash in the pan. A new feature that leaks data instantly.

station_logic.collection: Collection for future planning and vision.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with global strategists to expand reach.
station_logic.retention: Kept long-term as part of the grand design.

wands.reversed_logic: Lack of vision. Data collected for no clear future purpose.

station_logic.collection: Tracking how far your influence travels.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with ad-networks to see who is watching.
station_logic.retention: Retained to build a history of digital outreach.

wands.reversed_logic: Over-extension. Sharing with too many networks at once.

station_logic.collection: Data collected during community celebrations.
station_logic.sharing: Shared within the group to foster connection.
station_logic.retention: Kept as a record of a stable digital home.

wands.reversed_logic: Unstable foundation. The 'community' is selling your data.

station_logic.collection: Collection for competition; testing versions of you.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with testers to see how you react.
station_logic.retention: Kept until the 'winning' version is decided.

wands.reversed_logic: Meaningless conflict. Chaotic A/B testing that confuses users.

station_logic.collection: Collection of victories, points, and rewards.
station_logic.sharing: Shared publicly to celebrate success.
station_logic.retention: Retained forever as a trophy of user status.

wands.reversed_logic: Fall from grace. Rewards are stripped based on data changes.

station_logic.collection: Collection to defend the 'wall'; proving you are human.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with security partners to keep intruders out.
station_logic.retention: Kept to identify you as a trusted defender.

wands.reversed_logic: Giving up. The 'defenses' are down; data is wide open.

station_logic.collection: Rapid-fire collection happening in a blink.
station_logic.sharing: Shared instantly through live data feeds.
station_logic.retention: Transient retention; processed and gone in a flash.

wands.reversed_logic: Haste makes waste. Real-time data is sent to the wrong place.

station_logic.collection: Collection for endurance and system survival.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with reliability engineers to keep things running.
station_logic.retention: Persistent storage; data survives any catastrophe.

wands.reversed_logic: Defensive posture. Over-collection to 'prepare' for failure.

station_logic.collection: Collection of heavy data straining the system.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with CDNs to manage the load.
station_logic.retention: Retention is a burden; large files are a heavy weight.

wands.reversed_logic: Burnout. The 'burden' of your data causes the service to fail.

station_logic.collection: Collection to find the 'next big thing'.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with trend-forecasters to predict the future.
station_logic.retention: Kept as a record of early 'sparks' of interest.

wands.reversed_logic: False news. Algorithms create a trend you didn't start.

station_logic.collection: Aggressive collection to turn you into a sales lead.
station_logic.sharing: Shared with hungry agencies to pursue you.
station_logic.retention: Kept in the 'funnel' until ready to buy.

wands.reversed_logic: Scattered energy. Selling your data to too many leads.

station_logic.collection: Collection of your voice to build social presence.

station_logic.retention: Retained to nurture the fire of your digital brand.

wands.reversed_logic: Intimidation. Your 'voice' data is used to silence you.

station_logic.collection: Collection that defines market energy.

station_logic.retention: Retained as cornerstone of the digital vision.

wands.reversed_logic: Ruthlessness. Power used to crush user privacy.

station_logic.collection: New flow of personal communication and feelings.

station_logic.retention: Kept for its sentimental value.

cups.reversed_logic: Emotional spill. Private messages leaked or mishandled.

cups.reversed_logic: Disharmony. Dating data leads to a toxic connection.

cups.reversed_logic: Gossip. Friends' data shared with the wrong people.

cups.reversed_logic: New awareness. Realizing you shared too much out of boredom.

cups.reversed_logic: Acceptance. Moving on from a bad privacy experience.

cups.reversed_logic: Living in the past. Retaining data that should be forgotten.

cups.reversed_logic: Illusion. Marketing data that sells you a fake dream.

cups.reversed_logic: Fear of leaving. Terms that make deactivation impossible.
